channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 8th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish including broken glass. Entrance to Pauls Cray Hill Park between 16 and 18 Barnfield Rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapman's Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 lamp poles are broken with electrics exposed, 8th March
item.description:
Two of the lamp poles on Goose Green have the side open and the electric cables are showing. It seems pretty dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned metal pieces by goose green parc gates, 8th March
item.description:
Those have been there for weeks. There are thin white metal poles and other metal pieces.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two brown sofas dumped, 8th March
item.description:
Theses sofas have been there for a week. It will encourage anti social behaviour
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66-68, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smelly bins always left outside blocking the narrow pavement, 8th March
item.description:
These narrow pavements are always blocked by bins People need to take responsibility for their bins and rubbish This busy road is dangerous and mobility is an issue, someone was ran over a few weeks ago just on the corner of this road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Cottage Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wait button sometimes “cancels” itself with no green man, 8th March
item.description:
Wait button sometimes “cancels” itself with no green man. Pedestrian crossing near Cook’s Rd junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Stratford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another incidence of fly tipping, 8th March
item.description:
Rubbish (possibly a toilet) has been left outside the building and it's encouraging other people to dump their trash there
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned overflowing bin, 8th March
item.description:
Abandoned overflowing bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned crashed vehicle, 8th March
item.description:
This vehicle which has been smashed up on several sides has been left here for 2 weeks. It is taking up the whole lane. Please tow it away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Oakleigh Park South, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping behind bushes, 8th March
item.description:
Flytipping behind the bushes next to 95 wells way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in front of garages on adderley gardens, 8th March
item.description:
This was previously reported and part of the rubbish was removed 2/3/2026 . I was advised they would return the following day to complete clearance but have still not returned. Picture shows what still needs to be cleared.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Adderley Gardens, New Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded Vieolia recycling bin, 8th March
item.description:
After last Thursday’s bin collection it would appear that Vieolia have left a recycling bin on the corner of Beckenham Grove and Scotts Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Grove, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple dog fouls down North Cross Road pavement, 8th March
item.description:
There is at least 4 dog fouls on North Cross Road from the junction with Lacon road down to Lordship lane. Each has been walked in and spread. It is the left side pavement as you look up from Lordship lane. Please send someone to clean the pavement. Could someone else also investigate why this problem has increased so much recently? Some local bins have been removed by the council and I think this could be adding to the problem.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, North Cross Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: For three weeks now there have been several (8-10) gas canisters have been dumped on the edge in Brindley way., 8th March
item.description:
For over Three weeks now. .On the grass verge in Brindley Way, there are several (8-10) gas canisters dumped between the big Oak tree and the bushes . Two by the tree and the rest under the bush. There is some litter there too, stuck in the bushes. Please can these canisters be removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brindley Way, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Laughing gas canisters dumped on street, 8th March
item.description:
Laughing gas canisters dumped at the corner of Waterdale Road and Rutherglen Road. This is a constant issue unfortunately.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothle damaed road metre long, 8th March
item.description:
Large pothole defect round on the crack of the roundabout now large holes on the crack as you drive round cant miss them in car or on bikes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crittall's Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes 4 or more very large and deep, 8th March
item.description:
Large potholes 4 or more very large an deep, have reported before so poorly fixed they are back again deeper than before dangerous on motorbikes, bad for my wheels car as you cant miss them, all around the whole roundabout now as well. Can you fix it properly this time, so the fix lasts longer than amonth!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crittall's Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped traffic cones, 8th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped traffic cones outside a property. They have been there for more than a week. Maybe 2

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 231, Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter from back of Pasha Hotel, 8th March
item.description:
The back of Pasha Hotel has a bin that is constantly overflowing and all over the street attracting rodent infestations to all the surrounding buildings and businesses. There’s also residential flats that do not seem to have their own bins.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sultan Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th March
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped this rubbish in our front garden. The rubbish has medicines in, and lots of mail with personal details visible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince George Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
